pre_existing_failures.note: All 25 failures are pre-existing and unrelated to this story's scope: icon-set resolution mismatches (e.g. 'lucide:heart' vs expected 'ph:heart-bold') in tests/unit/components/ThemeIcon.test.ts and tests/unit/themes/treatments.test.ts, stemming from the watercolor theme-set landing (commit a50edf4, predates this epic). No file in receive.ts's or contactCache.ts's dependency graph is involved. Matches S01/S02/S03's recorded baseline (same 25 failures, same root cause).

lint.detail: No ESLint config exists in app/ (no .eslintrc*/eslint.config*); `next lint` prompts interactively to scaffold one. Treated as NO_LINT baseline, matching S01/S02/S03.
